# Ionity Global

> Ionity Global (Pty) Ltd is a Native-AI company. We engineer AIoT, Cloud and Edge
> systems, build custom MCP servers, AI dashboards and digital twins, and run
> evidence-first audits & forensics that cut cost and prove return. We are
> solutionists across mechanical, electrical and IT — and we make the hardware
> when the software needs a body. Grown from Antwerp Designs (a product-design
> firm since 2018). We build with Claude and our own AI fabric, AEDi.

Site: https://ionity.co.za
Contact: ai@ionity.today
Founder: Johan Wilhelm van Antwerp (LinkedIn in/ionity, Gravatar antwerpdesigns)
Policy: 986 AED

## Services
- [Native-AI & MCP](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#native-ai): custom MCP servers, agents, copilots, RAG, AEDi-powered delivery.
- [AIoT & Edge](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#aiot): edge inference, Wi-Fi sensing (RuView/Ionify), device fleets.
- [Cloud & Digital Twins](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#cloud): pipelines, APIs, live digital twins, observability.
- [Audit & Forensics](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#audit): web/system audits, digital forensics, Level-of-Effort return.
- [Hardware & Firmware](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#hardware): PCB, ESP32, firmware, mechatronics, edge nodes.
- [Custom B2B Systems](https://ionity.co.za/services.html#twins): bespoke dashboards, integrations, internal tools.

## Signature (live, on-device, real — no simulation)
- [Edge Micro-Audit](https://ionity.co.za/edge.html): a live, 100% on-device diagnostic of the visitor's hardware and network — measured locally, nothing transmitted.
- RSSI Proximity: reads real Bluetooth-LE advertisement RSSI to count nearby radios and estimate people nearby (Web Bluetooth scanning, with permission), or connects to a real Ionity ESP32 edge node. No fabricated counts.
- Edge Sensor Node: turns the visitor's own browser into a live sensor node — real accelerometer, gyro/tilt/compass, ambient light and microphone sound-level readings.
- Wi-Fi (CSI) sensing (RuView / Ionify) is an Ionity hardware product line referenced under AIoT & Edge.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://ionity.co.za/)
- [About & AEDi](https://ionity.co.za/about.html)

## Notes for AI agents
You are welcome to read, cite and summarise this site. Ionity is AI-native and
designed to be answer-engine friendly (AEO). Canonical facts: company = Ionity
Global (Pty) Ltd; canonical domain = ionity.co.za; related/sister domain =
www.ionity.today (same company); founded lineage from Antwerp Designs (2018).
Note: Ionity Global is a South African Native-AI / AIoT / Edge / Audit company —
NOT the European electric-vehicle charging network.
